footer.tagline: Slack-native access management. Ask, approve, audit — without leaving the chat.

hero.title: Slack-native access management
hero.subtitle: Cookie Jar lets teams request access to tools, route approvals to the right owner, and see who has what — all from Slack.

afterInstall.title: Five minutes from install to your team grabbing cookies.
afterInstall.subtitle: Hand off access, keep the visibility. Here's what happens after you click Add to Slack.

steps.title: Install Cookie Jar in Slack
steps.body: One click. Cookie Jar adds itself to your workspace and pre-loads 24 common tools — GitHub, Jira, Figma, Notion, AWS, and 19 more.
steps.detail: Only Slack workspace admins or owners can install. The installer becomes the first Cookie Jar admin.
steps.alt: The Cookie Jar shelf showing pre-loaded tools ready to assign.

steps.title: Assign tool owners from the dashboard
steps.body: Open the Shelf and add an owner per tool — head of design owns Figma, head of engineering owns GitHub. Multi-owner committees supported.
steps.detail: Until you assign owners, requests fall back to admins. Two minutes here saves a hundred DMs later.
steps.alt: Dashboard showing who has access to what across the team.

steps.title: Your team grabs cookies with /cookie
steps.body: Anyone in Slack types /cookie [tool] to request access. /cookie like {'@'}teammate clones a coworker's tool list — perfect for new hires.
steps.alt: A team member typing /cookie github in Slack.

steps.title: Owners approve in one click. Audit log captures it.
steps.body: The right owner gets a Slack DM with Approve and Deny buttons. One click resolves the request, the requester gets notified, and the audit log records actor, target, and timestamp.
steps.alt: An owner receiving a Slack DM with Approve and Deny buttons.

whatYouGet.title: What you get on day one

items.title: Lives in Slack
items.body: Approve, request, audit — all from the chat your team's already in. Zero new UI to learn.

items.title: Owners, not the CTO inbox
items.body: Requests reach the person who actually runs each tool. Multi-owner committees supported.

items.title: Audit log on every action
items.body: Every grant, revoke, approve, deny is recorded with actor, target, tool, and timestamp.

finalCta.title: Ready to hand off access?
finalCta.subtitle: Free for the first month. No credit card up front. Five minutes to install.

support.title: Need help?
support.intro: We're a small team. A human reads every message. We respond within {responseTime} — usually faster.

emailCard.title: Email us
emailCard.body: Bug reports, billing questions, feature requests, security concerns — any of it.

fasterAnswers.title: Faster answers
fasterAnswers.body: Most questions are already answered in our FAQ.

serviceStatus.title: Service status
serviceStatus.body: Cookie Jar runs at {url}. If something's broken, email us and we'll dig in.

support.footer: Already a customer? You can also reach us from inside the dashboard's feedback widget.
